prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FRZ2BSTFRND-6PC Product Type: BRACELET Brand (from catalog): Disney Frozen Existing Title: Frozen 2 Best Friends Matching Accessories Set Description: Celebrate your best friend in style with the Frozen 2 Best Friends Matching Bracelet And Accessories 6 Piece Set.

Set includes: matching bracelets, saying "Best" and "Friend", two rings, and two snap hair clips. Each piece is color coordinated, so it's easy to make matching outfits with your bestie.

With every piece featuring: Anna, Elsa, and Olaf, this makes the perfect duo gift for you and your best friend. Search Terms: elsa anna bff matching friendship bracelet and accesesory set gifts for girls best friend set stocking stuffers Features: - BRACELETS: Matching Bracelets, One Says Best And The Other Says Friend | A Great Stocking Stuffer - HAIR CLIPS AND RINGS: Each Comes With One Blue And One Purple | Match With Your Best Friend - MATCHING SET: Match With Your Best Friend With This Bracelet, Ring, and Hair Clip Set | Frozen 2 Accessories For Girls - DRESS UP FUN: Have Hours of Dress Up Fun With This Frozen Accessory Set | Dress Up Like Your Favorite Disney Princesses - OFFICIALLY LICENSED: Officially Licensed Disney Frozen 2 Jewelry Set | Featuring Your Favorite Characters: Elsa, Anna, and Olaf === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Frozen 2 Best Friends 6-Piece Bracelet Set

openai.item_name: Disney Frozen Best Friends Matching Accessories Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Matching Bracelets, Rings And Hair Clips, Elsa And Anna Characters, BFF Accessories For Girls

openai.title_differentiation: Matching Bracelets, Rings And Hair Clips, Anna Elsa Olaf, 6 Piece Gift Set, Stocking Stuffer, Dress Up Fun
